description_long: This object is a roughly carved wooden doll with a cylindrical body and a rounded, slightly irregular head. The front of the doll features a simple, abstract face with triangular eyes and a nose, and a faintly suggested mouth, all carved directly into the wood. The body is also cylindrical and features a darker, circular patch on the lower front, possibly representing a stylized feature or clothing detail. The surface is uneven and textured, with visible tool marks and a matte, unfinished appearance. The back and sides of the doll are unadorned, showing only the rough, natural wood texture. The overall appearance suggests a primitive or folk-art style, possibly hand-carved from a single piece of wood.
description: A primitive, hand-carved wooden doll with a simple face and rough, cylindrical body, featuring visible tool marks and a matte finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows the doll's abstract face with triangular eyes, a nose, and a faint mouth, as well as a dark patch on the lower body.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the rough, unadorned wood texture and the cylindrical shape, with no facial features visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays the most irregular and darkly textured surface, with no facial or decorative features.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the rough, carved wood surface and the seam between the head and body, with no facial features visible.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll appears to be a single carved wooden piece without garments or textile patterns.
attribute_pose: The doll is depicted in a static, upright position with a cylindrical torso and head; no limbs are present or articulated.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with simple, abstract features: triangular eyes, a carved nose, and a faint mouth.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smoothly carved from wood with no additional texture or color to suggest hair.
